citation: Kramida, A., Ralchenko, Yu., Reader, J., and NIST ASD Team. NIST Atomic Spectra Database (ver. 5.12), https://physics.nist.gov/asd
note: Strong persistent He I lines from the ASD Lines query (observed air wavelengths, 200-2000 nm, Aki-ranked). The GSZ model is a single central field with no exchange (singlet/triplet) splitting, so its one (n,l) orbital set is compared coarsely against these real lines at the disclosed 5% tolerance; the singlet/triplet members of a given n,l -> n',l' both map onto the model's single transition.
